content:
Hey Darakshan! Good to see you.

What's on your mind today? We could work on any of the pods, explore some connections, or talk through a new idea you're mulling over.
do you know what my sign is?  just curious.
Yep — Capricorn, according to your profile. December or early January birthday?

Nice — right in the heart of Capricorn season. A few days after the solstice, when the light is just starting to return.

Anything you want to dig into today?
